channel.title: agent-bill-guard — Claude Code Cost Control
channel.description: Technical blog: Claude Code token usage tracking, spending limits, budget enforcement, and cost management for developers.

item.title: Anthropic API Cost Control with Local Proxy Guardrails
item.description: A practical guide to anthropic api cost control using a local Python proxy to track token usage, estimate spend, inspect tool calls, and enforce hard budget limits for Claude Code workflows.

item.title: Claude Code Billing: Track Token Costs Locally with agent-bill-guard
item.description: A practical guide to Claude Code billing: how token costs accumulate, how to inspect usage locally, and how agent-bill-guard can enforce spend limits while you iterate.

item.title: Claude Code Usage Tracking with a Local Proxy That Measures Tokens, Cost, and Tool Calls
item.description: A practical guide to claude code usage tracking using agent-bill-guard, a local Python proxy that logs token usage, cost, and tool calls while enforcing spend limits.

item.title: claude code expensive: how to measure and control real agent spend
item.description: A technical guide to why Claude Code can get expensive, how token and tool usage actually drives cost, and how to enforce spend limits with Agent Bill Guard.

item.title: claude code api cost: practical ways to measure and control spend locally
item.description: A developer-focused guide to claude code api cost: how usage turns into spend, what to measure, where costs hide, and how to enforce local budget limits with agent-bill-guard.

item.title: Claude Code Rate Limits: What They Are and How to Stay Under Them
item.description: Claude Code sessions can hit Anthropic API rate limits unexpectedly, especially in agentic loops. Here is how to track token usage live and avoid hitting caps.

item.title: Claude Code Token Usage: Track Sessions Live with agent-bill-guard
item.description: Claude Code token usage is hard to see while a session is running. This post explains how agent-bill-guard tracks tokens and estimated cost live with a tiny local Python proxy.

item.title: claude code spending limit: enforce a hard per-session budget locally
item.description: claude code spending limit options are limited out of the box. This guide shows how to enforce a hard per-session budget locally with agent-bill-guard.

item.title: Claude Code Hooks: What They Can (and Can't) Do for Cost Control
item.description: Claude Code hooks are useful for behavioral governance, but they cannot see Anthropic API cost data. Here's how I pair hooks with agent-bill-guard for spend monitoring.

item.title: claude code cost: how to track, explain, and cap runaway agent spend
item.description: claude code cost can jump fast when an agent loops through large files or retries tool calls. This guide explains what drives cost, how to inspect usage, and how to cap spend locally with agent-bill-guard.
